mentions.note: Topgolf breakup to Leonard Green for $1B completed January; kept 40% stake (now valued), announced $200M buyback; trading 34x forward earnings is pricey; stock ran from $12 to $16 before pullback; cleaner story at Acushnet given execution track record.
GLP-1 injectable dominance (21% weight loss vs. 15% for Novo); joint venture with Nvidia on addiction treatment trials; expanding indication pipeline supports 10%+ rally.
